changes.before: The dwarves answered with movement, not talk.
The villagers were not fools.
Dragonblight did the rest.
The thought hit hard enough to make her stumble.
The thought came hard enough to stop her in the middle of the file.
changes.after: She stopped in the middle of the file.

changes.before: At night the sea stopped being a road and became black motion under blacker sky. Jaina sat on a coil of rope with her back to the mast and forced the answer into plainer words until it could live outside her own head.
changes.after: At night the sea stopped being a road and became black motion under blacker sky. Jaina sat on a coil of rope with her back to the mast and forced the answer into plainer words until she could say it aloud.

changes.before: The road south widened, then narrowed again as the capital pulled traffic inward.
changes.after: The road south widened, then narrowed again as traffic thickened toward the capital.

changes.before: Every mile showed the same offense in a different dress.
changes.after: The same offense kept recurring in different dress.

changes.before: The word settled across the little court harder than any oath.
That almost pulled a laugh out of her.
That was enough.
That was enough.
That was the only good thing she got from the crossing.
That was almost worse.
The southbound run had none of the northbound malice.
changes.after: No impossible headwind tried to shoulder the schooner broadside on the way south.

changes.before: The villagers were not fools.
That landed.
There it was.
The beauty of the trap first. The neat turn inside it.
changes.after: He would have gone straight for the turn in it, for the neat way the trap closed.

changes.before: The blade is tied to the same work as the plague.
changes.after: The blade is built on the same plague magic.

changes.before: By landfall the answer existed.
changes.after: By landfall she knew who had to buy the seconds.
